TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pnguu, title = Pnguu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pnguu} }

S.FORM: alang Pnguu ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 341 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 94%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pnguu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pnguu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pnguu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pnguu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pnguu hya' ga Tfuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pnguu ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 341 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 94%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pnguu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Pnguu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pnguu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pnguu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Pnguu hya' ga Tfuya. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pŋuu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pŋuu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na pŋuu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pŋuu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pŋuu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pŋuu ħjaʔ ɣa t*uja. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
